title: phlomis bovei subsp. maroccana
intro: Phlomis bovei subsp. maroccana, commonly known as Moroccan Jerusalem sage, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Morocco. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phlomis bovei subsp. maroccana include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
